titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/251

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=233 status=live modified=2021-04-06 08:13:59.183344+00 | translation moa=232 status=live modified=2021-04-06 08:14:40.583404+00

div.p:
Notum sit Omnibus tam presentibus quam futuris quod Ego frater Alanus prior fratrum Hospitalis Ierusalem in
Anglia . de communi consilio ⁊ assensu fratrum capituli nostri concessi ⁊ presenti carta confirmaui
Canonicis sancte Crucis de Edenesburg’ terras nostras quas in Galeweia habemus scilicet artun ⁊ hirtun
cum suis rectis diuisis . ⁊ cum omnibus ad predictas terras pertinentibus habendas ⁊ tenendas de domo nostra
sibi in perpetuum libere ⁊ quiete ab omni seruitio . ⁊ consuetudine ad nos inde pertinente . eadem scilicet
libertate ⁊ dignitate quam Rollandus nobis illas donauit ⁊ confirmauit . reddendo singulis annis
domui nostre quadraginta solidos . ad duos terminos . medietatem scilicet ad letare Ierusalem . et medietatem ad
assumptionem beate Marie . Hiis testibus . fratre Matheo . fratre Willelmo . fratre Rob’ de lindes’ . fratre Rob’ percio
capellanis . fratre Gilliberto de ver . fratre Roberto filii Ric’ . fratre Rob’ pi ... fratre Simone Scotie per quem hec
carta facta fuit . fratre Samsone . Simone clerico ad capitulum sancti Michaelis anno Incarnationis . m . c .
xcii .

Let it be known to all people, both present and to come, that I, Brother Alan, prior of the Brethren of the Hospital of Jerusalem in England, with the advice and agreement of the brethren of our chapter, have granted, and by the present charter made firm, to the canons of Holyrood in Edinburgh, our lands that we have in Galloway, that is, Artun and Hirtun, with their correct bounds, and with all that belongs to the afroesaid lands, for them to have and to hold of our house in perpetuity, free and quit from all service and custom pertaining to us from there, that is, the same liberty and dignity as Roland donated them to us and confirmed, by rendering forty shillings each year to our house at two terms, that is, half at Laetare Ierusalem [the third Sunday of Advent], and half at the Assumption of Blessed Mary [15 August]. With these witnesses, Brother William, Brother Robert of Lindsay, Brother Robert Park, chaplains; Brother Gilbert de Vere, Brother Robert son of Richard, Brother Robert Pi..., Brother Simon of Scotia, by whom this charter was produced, Brother Samson, Simon the clerk, at the chapterhouse of St Michael, in the year of the Incarnation, 1192.
